metadata.title: Turning a Sneaky Corner Into a Fast Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught the enemy off guard with a quick peek and sharp shots. Watch how positioning and timing made this play clean and efficient. What’s your favorite clutch moment?

Share your best clutch plays in the comments!
